creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to Jashank Jeremy from comment #1)

Unsure, but the following looks odd to me, in that  is indicates (multiple times) setting the automatic flag for pkg-devel yet seems to install a /var/cache/pkg/pkg-1.17.5~e586eba0c8.pkg (not -devel). Between it indicates "decided local pkg... to install" and twice indicates "decided remote pkg... to install" ("..." is for omitted text).

Details of the sequence of references to pkg or pkg-devel:

DBG(2)[17354]> universe: add new local pkg: pkg, (pkg-1.17.5:2$2$wnqyeczqozz7cn8dux6pcu8ky3w91yu6bb8m7urcemx84tgntmen959zs9a4q5yze8ws755f5s3uf8igknn6qgfy8rkx86qmmjxe9rn)
. . .
DBG(2)[17354]> universe: add new remote pkg: pkg-devel, (pkg-devel-1.17.99.9:2$2$mhuodi9dh3pry7359mw9pwc8keg19jrizbd5cb7mgj3kcagyo3q3ez6mw3y8yapi1cu7riujokitkoowj6i6319quf9smbf38g5ykcd)
DBG(2)[17354]> Pkg> adding options: DOCS = on
DBG(2)[17354]> universe: add new remote pkg: pkg, (pkg-1.17.5:2$2$wnqyeczqozz7cn8dux6pcu8ky3w91yu6bb8m7urcemx84tgntmen959zs9a4q5yze8ws755f5s3uf8igknn6qgfy8rkx86qmmjxe9rn)
. . .
DBG(2)[17354]> set automatic flag for pkg-devel
. . .
DBG(2)[17354]> decided local pkg-2$2$wnqyeczqozz7cn8dux6pcu8ky3w91yu6bb8m7urcemx84tgntmen959zs9a4q5yze8ws755f5s3uf8igknn6qgfy8rkx86qmmjxe9rn to install
DBG(2)[17354]> decided remote pkg-2$2$wnqyeczqozz7cn8dux6pcu8ky3w91yu6bb8m7urcemx84tgntmen959zs9a4q5yze8ws755f5s3uf8igknn6qgfy8rkx86qmmjxe9rn to delete
. . .
DBG(2)[17354]> decided remote pkg-devel-2$2$mhuodi9dh3pry7359mw9pwc8keg19jrizbd5cb7mgj3kcagyo3q3ez6mw3y8yapi1cu7riujokitkoowj6i6319quf9smbf38g5ykcd to delete
. . .
DBG(2)[17354]> solver: ignoring package pkg-devel(2$2$mhuodi9dh3pry7359mw9pwc8keg19jrizbd5cb7mgj3kcagyo3q3ez6mw3y8yapi1cu7riujokitkoowj6i6319quf9smbf38g5ykcd) as its state has not been changed
. . .
DBG(2)[17354]> set automatic flag for pkg-devel
. . .
DBG(2)[17354]> decided local pkg-2$2$wnqyeczqozz7cn8dux6pcu8ky3w91yu6bb8m7urcemx84tgntmen959zs9a4q5yze8ws755f5s3uf8igknn6qgfy8rkx86qmmjxe9rn to delete
DBG(2)[17354]> decided remote pkg-2$2$wnqyeczqozz7cn8dux6pcu8ky3w91yu6bb8m7urcemx84tgntmen959zs9a4q5yze8ws755f5s3uf8igknn6qgfy8rkx86qmmjxe9rn to install
. . .
DBG(2)[17354]> decided remote pkg-devel-2$2$mhuodi9dh3pry7359mw9pwc8keg19jrizbd5cb7mgj3kcagyo3q3ez6mw3y8yapi1cu7riujokitkoowj6i6319quf9smbf38g5ykcd to delete
. . .
DBG(2)[17354]> decided local pkg-2$2$wnqyeczqozz7cn8dux6pcu8ky3w91yu6bb8m7urcemx84tgntmen959zs9a4q5yze8ws755f5s3uf8igknn6qgfy8rkx86qmmjxe9rn to delete
DBG(2)[17354]> decided remote pkg-2$2$wnqyeczqozz7cn8dux6pcu8ky3w91yu6bb8m7urcemx84tgntmen959zs9a4q5yze8ws755f5s3uf8igknn6qgfy8rkx86qmmjxe9rn to install
. . .
DBG(2)[17354]> decided remote pkg-devel-2$2$mhuodi9dh3pry7359mw9pwc8keg19jrizbd5cb7mgj3kcagyo3q3ez6mw3y8yapi1cu7riujokitkoowj6i6319quf9smbf38g5ykcd to delete
. . .
DBG(2)[17354]> solver: ignoring package pkg-devel(2$2$mhuodi9dh3pry7359mw9pwc8keg19jrizbd5cb7mgj3kcagyo3q3ez6mw3y8yapi1cu7riujokitkoowj6i6319quf9smbf38g5ykcd) as its state has not been changed
. . .
